title: Lycianthes solitaria
taxonomy: Lycianthes solitaria is classified as a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. It is native to Central and South America, specifically found in countries like Mexico and Costa Rica. The plant belongs to the genus Lycianthes, which consists of various species of flowering plants. Lycianthes solitaria is further classified as a member of the Lycianthes section, Solanum subgenus, and the Solanaceae family. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
